seoTitle: Clayfield vs Clear Mountain — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clayfield and Clear Mountain. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clayfield vs Clear Mountain: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clayfield and Clear Mountain.
heading: Clayfield vs Clear Mountain — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clayfield, Queensland and Clear Mountain, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clayfield has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Clear Mountain (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clayfield or Clear Mountain safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clayfield has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Clear Mountain scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clayfield scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Clear Mountain scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clayfield or Clear Mountain?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clayfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
